{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/92903761?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/odgrso", "id": 92903761, "login": "odgrso", "node_id": "U_kgDOBYmZUQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-65592", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:A/VC:H/VI:H/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "## Impact
The Resource Locator passes the workflow-persisted `cachedResultUrl` to `window.open()` without scheme validation. When a victim opens the crafted workflow and interact with external links, the JavaScript payload runs in the victim's browser. 

## Patches
The issue has been fixed in n8n versions 1.123.64, 2.29.8, and 2.30.1. Users should upgrade to one of these versions or later to remediate the vulnerability.

## Workarounds
If upgrading is not immediately possible, administrators should consider the following temporary mitigations:
- Restrict workflow creation and editing permissions to fully trusted users only.
- Audit existing workflows for unexpected `cachedResultUrl` values containing non-HTTP(S) schemes.

These workarounds do not fully remediate the risk and should only be used as short-term mitigation measures.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-9wcp-9r3j-383q", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-22T17:59:07Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9wcp-9r3j-383q", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-9wcp-9r3j-383q"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-65592"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-22T17:59:07Z", "references": ["https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/security/advisories/GHSA-9wcp-9r3j-383q", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-65592", "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/n8n@1.123.64", "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/n8n@2.29.8", "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/n8n@2.30.1", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/n8n-before-stored-dom-xss-via-cachedresulturl", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9wcp-9r3j-383q"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/n8n-io/n8n/security-advisories/GHSA-9wcp-9r3j-383q", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n", "summary": "n8n: Stored DOM XSS via Resource Locator `cachedResultUrl`", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-22T17:59:08Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-9wcp-9r3j-383q", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.123.64", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.123.64"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.30.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.30.0, < 2.30.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.29.8", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0-rc.0, < 2.29.8"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: n8n: Stored DOM XSS via Resource Locator `cachedResultUrl`
